since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.12%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.15% · BTC +1.24% · Gold -0.45% · Nasdaq100 +0.03%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.12%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.12%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +16.41%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +16.41%, META +6.44%, NVDA +2.93%, UEC +2.31%, AMAT +1.64%. Laggards: RXRX -7.64%, S -5.33%, MDB -4.92%, CRWD -4.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.22% at $148.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
